project.name: Maven JFrog Private-Artifact Test
project.description: BKLN-2092 end-to-end test repo. Depends on com.backline.test:demo-lib:1.0.0 which lives in the backlineai.jfrog.io maven-test virtual repo. demo-lib transitively pulls in log4j-core 2.14.1 (CVE-2021-44228, Log4Shell), so a Trivy/SCA scan of this project surfaces a CRITICAL finding that Backline SCA Planning will try to remediate. Resolving demo-lib's effective POM requires authenticating against JFrog — the runner's JFrogRegistryMavenPackageRegistryHandler injects ~/.m2/settings.xml with a Bearer token, then mvn / Gradle resolve through the maven-test virtual repo.
